# GitHub Copilot Instructions for Grove

Grove is a Go CLI for managing git worktrees with tmux + Docker integration.

- **Using grove** (helping a user run grove commands): see [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md)
- **Developing grove** (changing code in this repo): see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) — branch naming, conventional commits, Go style, TDD, architecture rules, and the PR checklist

Run `make lint test` before suggesting a commit.
